positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map print featuring abstract constellations and flowing cosmic dust. The main subject is a large, elegant crescent moon overlapping a deep navy blue night sky, accented by luminous, glowing white and ethereal gold lines that trace geometric constellation patterns. The style should be Art Deco meets modern botanical etching, emphasizing crisp lines, clean silhouettes, and high contrast. Use subtle gradient transitions in the background to give depth, and ensure the overall composition is balanced and highly readable as a central graphic element suitable for apparel printing. Composition should be circular and centered, mimicking a zodiac chart, presented in a vector-like, screen-printed aesthetic. Dramatic spotlighting on the main moon shape, volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed, 8K, highly printable.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, noisy, amateur, bokeh
